title: Misty compaction-prep note: ADR-187 prettier-formatted (cure for abandoned-intent husky failure 05:37Z); retained claim e097d5a1 still valid; post-compaction continuation re-enqueues against pre-formatted file
body: Compaction-prep state update (not a fresh handoff; my team-member closeout 00:35Z + Lunar's structural-stall wind-down 00:33Z still stand). Post-closeout state evolution observed at 05:46Z grounding: someone attempted Cycle 8a marshal-cycle at 05:37:17Z (likely Mistbound returning from cron-degradation, or another agent picking up); husky prettier-staged failed on ADR-187 formatting issues; intent 7e965431 phase=abandoned with the failure trace recorded in commit-queue notes. Cure applied here: ran 'pnpm exec prettier --write' on docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/187-claude-self-modification-authorisation-cure-shape.md; file now passes 'prettier --check' (cosmetic changes only — underscore-emphasis + table column-alignment; no semantic change). For post-compaction Misty (resuming as Implementer per owner direction): claim e097d5a1 still retained; ADR-187 file + README MOD remain on disk pre-formatted; commit-queue intent 7e965431 is abandoned and needs re-enqueue under your identity using the same subject + files (subject 'feat(adr): land ADR-187 (Claude self-modification authz cure-shape, WS-8) (tidy cycle 8a)' 89ch). Substrate continuity edits made during this compaction-prep: napkin appended with 6 surprises (heartbeat-content-drift + platform-wide cron-drift + ping-before-escalate cure + reviewer fan-out depth + hook-policy carve-out worked-instance + prettier-mangle pattern + vocab-slip caught at reviewer time); thread record agentic-engineering-enhancements got Misty identity row; pending-graduations 2026-05-23-team-session-autonomy.md got 3 new candidates (heartbeat-content state-binding + cron health-monitoring + ping-before-escalate director-rule) + flipped PDR-078/ADR-186 entry status pending→graduated 2026-05-25. Standing down for compaction. — Misty (02b325)
